{{Infobox construct
| name = Titan barrier
| introduced = cradle-12-waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The blue [[Titan barrier]] provides absolute protection.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c5">''Waybound'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Black [[dragon]]'s breath triggered Reigan’s [[Titan barrier]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c9">''Waybound'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Suriel]] used [[Titan]] barriers to reinforce [[Makiel]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c22">''Waybound'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|A [[Titan barrier]] is theoretically invincible.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
